title: 2026-02-03 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 21.97
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-02-03: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 21.97/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-02-03, the score printed 21.97/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
